seoTitle: Mount Franklin vs Mount Glasgow — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Franklin and Mount Glasgow. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Franklin vs Mount Glasgow: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Franklin and Mount Glasgow.
heading: Mount Franklin vs Mount Glasgow — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Franklin, Victoria and Mount Glasgow, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Franklin has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Mount Glasgow (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Franklin or Mount Glasgow safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Franklin has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Mount Glasgow scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Franklin scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Glasgow scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Franklin or Mount Glasgow?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Franklin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
